entry.title: Re: Cannot Download AdobeForm Template from SAP Business...
entry.content: Does anyone know what's going on - some forms download properly, some zip files are empty - any help would be appreciated

entry.title: can not delete schema
entry.content: while i trying to delete schema the message appaear :drop schema cascade feature not supported global temporary table must be empty to drop

entry.title: Re: How to Make the Transition from SAP GTS 11.0 to SAP Global Trade Services, edition for SAP HANA
entry.content:
Hello Anurag, these are some links that you are reference for the upgrade to GTS E4H (Edition for Hana). 

Conversion Guide for SAP GTS, edition for SAP HANA

Simplification List for SAP GTS, edition for SAP HANA

Upgrade Guide for SAP GTS, edition for SAP HANA

Configuration Guide for SAP GTS, edition for SAP HANA

Administration Guide for SAP GTS, edition for SAP HANA

3033398 - SAP GTS, edition for SAP HANA: Conversion readiness check

Gabriel

entry.title: Inside the December Edition - Thank you for Making This Year Unforgettable!
entry.content:
The December Edition of the SAP Oil, Gas, and Energy Newsletter is here! Warm wishes for a Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year - let's step into 2025 stronger and more connected than ever.

SAP Energy and Utilities Team 

Dear Oil, Gas, and Energy Community,

The end of the year is approaching fast, providing an opportunity to recall memorable moments we shared and incredible milestones reached in 2024.

This year, we've traveled to Seville, Houston, Abu Dhabi, Porto, Monaco, Orlando, Barcelona, and many other fascinating destinations to get to know you personally, connect, exchange ideas, and learn from one another. Whether in person or online, we never miss an opportunity to engage.

And we’re already gearing up for our next big event: Get ready to discover the latest trends and solutions at the next annual SAP Energy and Utilities Conference. Hope to see you in Rotterdam from April 8-10, 2025!

In 2024, we introduced a new webinar format – SAP Espresso Sessions to keep you up to date on important industry topics and address your queries.

Throughout the year, our journey has been a whirlwind of innovation, collaboration, and discovery—all captured in our annual highlight video. We invite you to take a few minutes to revisit these wonderful experiences shared across the globe.

As 2025 approaches, our focus remains on SAP innovations. Harnessing the potential of Artificial intelligence, we are thrilled to pursue transformative solutions powered by AI, paving the way to the future!

This year, we proudly launched the SAP Field Logistics solution, a groundbreaking tool that empowers field workers to efficiently manage orders, schedules, deliveries, and services.

Along with our partner Wipro, we developed the SAP STO 360 end-to-end solution on SAP BTP. This innovation has redefined the way we manage maintenance shutdowns for plants, in Oil, Gas, and Energy, ensuring we stay ahead of evolving industry needs.

Would you like to know more about our customers? In this edition, read stories from Halliburton, Woodside Energy, Crescent Petroleum, SATORP, Falcon Oilfield Fuels, Intergaz LTD, Squadron Energy, KazMunayGas, SK C&C, and many more.

We are entering 2025 equipped with new technologies, cutting-edge innovations, and what’s most important great people next to us, whether it is our family, friends, or helpful colleagues.

The SAP Oil, Gas, and Energy Team wishes you and your dear ones a Happy Holiday season and a peaceful and prosperous New Year!

 

Read the full version of the SAP Oil, Gas, and Energy Newsletter and subscribe to receive the next issue directly in your e-mail box.

entry.title: How to Set Up a Realistic SAP S/4HANA Practice Environment?
entry.content: What are the best ways to set up a realistic SAP S/4HANA test environment for learning? I want to work hands-on with tools like SAP Process Builder, ABAP, and cloud deployment in a way that mirrors real-world usage. Are there affordable sandbox or REALISTIC trial options available for this (including SAP Joule and all the products that are part of a full SAP license)?

entry.title: Re: show only one value which is post on latest
entry.content:
it would be better if you would provide how you are dealing with AT ENDAT. But as I can see from you screenshot BUDAT at the beggingng of the line, and matnr and werks is inside the line. It is NOT an option for AT ENDAT - your components should be one by one. AT ENDAT compare not only field itself but from the begining to the field. Below I have provided some snippet how to deal with AT ENDAT. But please check and inform whether it is clear.

Then: my advise to use either (depeding on the system version and context) SORTED table or GROUP BY. I also have provided a snippet. full code is here. Thank you for your answer.

Sorry for 2 hundred lines, but it is the best way how I could explain what I mean.

 

 

 

CLASS lcl_app DEFINITION.

  PUBLIC SECTION.
    METHODS main.
  PROTECTED SECTION.

  PRIVATE SECTION.

    TYPES: BEGIN OF ts_forecast
            , budat TYPE sydatum
            , timestamp TYPE timestamp
            , vtstamp TYPE timestamp
            , racct TYPE char10
            , matnr TYPE matnr18
            , werks TYPE werks_d
            , lbkum TYPE umlme
            , msl TYPE umlme
            , poper TYPE char2
            , gjahr TYPE char4
          , END OF ts_forecast
          , tt_forecast TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ts_forecast WITH EMPTY KEY
          .

    DATA mt_some_forecast TYPE tt_forecast.

    METHODS _do_load_prefill.


    METHODS _read_max_by_at_new.
    METHODS _read_max_by_srt.
    METHODS _read_max_group_by.
    METHODS _read_max_group_by_no_membr.

ENDCLASS.


CLASS lcl_app IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD main.



    _do_load_prefill( ).


    _read_max_by_at_new( ).
    _read_max_by_srt( ).
    _read_max_group_by( ).
    _read_max_group_by_no_membr( ).


  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD _read_max_by_at_new.

    DATA lt_some_forecast_init TYPE tt_forecast.
    DATA lt_tab_with_max_date TYPE tt_forecast.

    DATA lv_combination_is_new TYPE abap_bool.

    FIELD-SYMBOLS <fs_some_forecast> TYPE ts_forecast.
    lt_some_forecast_init = mt_some_forecast. " just to to change initial tab for other approaches

    SORT lt_some_forecast_init BY matnr werks  " you need to do sorting
                               budat DESCENDING
                               .


    "" this WILL NOT GROUP CORRECTLY because budat is differ and it is on the LEFR from your component MATNR
    "" NO GROUP ~~~~~ NO GROUP ~~~~~ NO GROUP ~~~~~ NO GROUP ~~~~~ NO GROUP ~~~~~
    LOOP AT lt_some_forecast_init ASSIGNING <fs_some_forecast>.
      lv_combination_is_new = abap_false.
      AT NEW matnr .
        lv_combination_is_new = abap_true.
      ENDAT.
      AT NEW werks .
        lv_combination_is_new = abap_true.
      ENDAT.

      IF lv_combination_is_new EQ abap_true.
        APPEND <fs_some_forecast> TO lt_tab_with_max_date.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.
    "" NO GROUP ~~~~~ NO GROUP ~~~~~ NO GROUP ~~~~~ NO GROUP ~~~~~ NO GROUP ~~~~~
    """""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""'
    """""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""'
    """""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""'

    """ but here
    TYPES: BEGIN OF ts_key_at_begin_of_line
         , matnr TYPE matnr18 " what is in the AT_ENDAT - should be at the BEGGING
        , werks TYPE werks_d  " what is in the AT_ENDAT - should be at the BEGGING
        , budat TYPE sydatum
        , timestamp TYPE timestamp
        , vtstamp TYPE timestamp
        , racct TYPE char10
        , lbkum TYPE umlme
        , msl TYPE umlme
        , poper TYPE char2
        , gjahr TYPE char4
      , END OF ts_key_at_begin_of_line
      , tt_key_at_begin_of_line TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ts_key_at_begin_of_line WITH EMPTY KEY
      .

    DATA lt_key_at_begin_of_line  TYPE tt_key_at_begin_of_line .
    FIELD-SYMBOLS <fs_key_at_begin> TYPE ts_key_at_begin_of_line .
    DATA lt_tab_with_max_date2 TYPE tt_forecast.

    MOVE-CORRESPONDING lt_some_forecast_init TO lt_key_at_begin_of_line.
    CLEAR lt_tab_with_max_date2.

    LOOP AT lt_key_at_begin_of_line ASSIGNING <fs_key_at_begin>.
      lv_combination_is_new = abap_false.
      AT NEW matnr .
        lv_combination_is_new = abap_true.
      ENDAT.
      AT NEW werks .
        lv_combination_is_new = abap_true.
      ENDAT.

      IF lv_combination_is_new EQ abap_true.
        APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_tab_with_max_date2 ASSIGNING <fs_some_forecast>.
        MOVE-CORRESPONDING <fs_key_at_begin> TO <fs_some_forecast>.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.
    "

    BREAK-POINT.
    " please compare lt_tab_with_max_date2 and lt_tab_with_max_date

  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD _read_max_by_srt.
    DATA lt_tab_with_max_date TYPE SORTED TABLE OF ts_forecast WITH UNIQUE KEY matnr werks.

    FIELD-SYMBOLS <fs_some_forecast> TYPE ts_forecast.

    SORT mt_some_forecast BY matnr werks
                             budat DESCENDING.

    LOOP AT mt_some_forecast ASSIGNING <fs_some_forecast>.
      INSERT <fs_some_forecast> INTO TABLE lt_tab_with_max_date.
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD _read_max_group_by.
    DATA lt_tab_with_max_date TYPE tt_forecast.

    FIELD-SYMBOLS <fs_some_forecast> TYPE ts_forecast.
    FIELD-SYMBOLS <fs_with_max_date> TYPE ts_forecast.
    FIELD-SYMBOLS <fs_some_grp> TYPE ts_forecast.

    SORT mt_some_forecast BY matnr werks
                             budat DESCENDING.

    " this is a quite overhead approach in your case

    LOOP AT mt_some_forecast ASSIGNING <fs_some_grp> " it is group- pseudo-oboject - not LINE, but GROUP
          GROUP BY ( key1 = <fs_some_grp>-matnr  key2 = <fs_some_grp>-werks ). " you are providing keys

     " LOOP AT GROUP <fs_some_grp> ASSIGNING <fs_some_forecast>. " here we get LINE from GROUP
        READ TABLE mt_some_forecast ASSIGNING <fs_some_forecast>
            WITH KEY matnr = <fs_some_grp>-matnr
                     werks = <fs_some_grp>-werks.
        IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
          APPEND <fs_some_forecast> TO lt_tab_with_max_date.
        ENDIF.
      "ENDLOOP.

    ENDLOOP.


  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD _read_max_group_by_no_membr.
    DATA lt_tab_with_max_date TYPE tt_forecast.

    TYPES: BEGIN OF ts_key_line
           , matnr TYPE matnr18
            , werks TYPE werks_d
        , END OF ts_key_line
        .
    FIELD-SYMBOLS <fs_some_forecast> TYPE ts_forecast.
    FIELD-SYMBOLS <fs_with_max_date> TYPE ts_forecast.
    FIELD-SYMBOLS <fs_some_grp> TYPE ts_forecast.

    FIELD-SYMBOLS <fs_key_line> TYPE ts_key_line.

    CLEAR lt_tab_with_max_date.

    SORT mt_some_forecast BY matnr werks
                             budat DESCENDING.

    """ IF need oly keys - you can use WITHOUT MEMBERS

    LOOP AT mt_some_forecast ASSIGNING <fs_some_grp> " it is group- pseudo-oboject - not LINE, but GROUP
          GROUP BY ( matnr = <fs_some_grp>-matnr werks = <fs_some_grp>-werks )  " you are providing keys
          WITHOUT MEMBERS " and here we get only keys without addition fields
      ASSIGNING <fs_key_line>. " in case without membes we could not LOOP at GROUP

      READ TABLE mt_some_forecast ASSIGNING <fs_with_max_date>
            WITH KEY matnr = <fs_key_line>-matnr
                     werks = <fs_key_line>-werks.
      IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
        APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_tab_with_max_date ASSIGNING <fs_some_forecast> .
        MOVE-CORRESPONDING <fs_with_max_date> TO <fs_some_forecast>.
      ENDIF.


    ENDLOOP.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD _do_load_prefill.
    DATA lv_ts TYPE timestamp.
    GET TIME STAMP FIELD lv_ts.

    mt_some_forecast = VALUE #(
     ( budat = sy-datum - 20 timestamp = lv_ts vtstamp = lv_ts
      racct = '22000' matnr = '2400011' werks = 'D001' lbkum = 10 msl = 3 poper = 4 gjahr = 2025 )

     ( budat = sy-datum - 20 timestamp = lv_ts vtstamp = lv_ts
      racct = '22000' matnr = '2400011' werks = 'DK02' lbkum = 10 msl = 3 poper = 4 gjahr = 2025 )

     ( budat = sy-datum - 20 timestamp = lv_ts vtstamp = lv_ts
      racct = '22000' matnr = '2400011' werks = 'D001' lbkum = 10 msl = 3 poper = 4 gjahr = 2025 )

     ( budat = sy-datum - 30 timestamp = lv_ts vtstamp = lv_ts
      racct = '22000' matnr = '2400011' werks = 'DK02' lbkum = 10 msl = 3 poper = 4 gjahr = 2025 )

     ( budat = sy-datum - 30 timestamp = lv_ts vtstamp = lv_ts
      racct = '22000' matnr = '2400011' werks = 'D001' lbkum = 10 msl = 3 poper = 4 gjahr = 2025 )

     ( budat = sy-datum - 30 timestamp = lv_ts vtstamp = lv_ts
      racct = '22000' matnr = '2400011' werks = 'D001' lbkum = 10 msl = 3 poper = 4 gjahr = 2025 )
    ).

  ENDMETHOD.

ENDCLASS.

START-OF-SELECTION.
  NEW lcl_app( )->main( ).

entry.title: SAP Community Meetup Yerevan
entry.content:
We are excited to invite you to the upcoming SAP Community Meetup, where you’ll hear the latest news and updates on local SAP initiatives and gain valuable insights from SAP experts and representatives of the academic community.

🗓 Event Details:

  • Date: 17 December 2024
  • Time: 17:00
  • Location: ASUE, Erasmus Hall (NOTE: Last minute changes of the hall may occur)
  • Audience: Open to anyone interested in SAP solutions and training opportunities in Armenia.

Registration: Preferably through this page or in case you are not a member of SAP Community you can also use our Eventbrite registration

What’s on the Agenda?

 

  • Overview of Upcoming Initiatives and free SAP Trainings in Armenia

    • Speakers:
      • Sos Khachikyan, Head of the Chair of Macroeconomics
      • Tsovinar Chugaszyan, SAP Business Technology Platform Product Manager

  • SAP in Armenia

    • Speaker: Valeri Sargsyan, SAP Armenia Country Manager

  • Presentations by Local Partners and Academic Community members

    • Insights from industry experts on real-world applications of SAP solutions.

  • Networking

    • Connect with SAP representatives, local partners, and fellow attendees to explore collaboration opportunities and future initiatives.

entry.title: CPI - Adapter RabbitMQ consumer Message - Wrong converstion to base64
entry.content:
I am using SAP CPI with a Groovy script, and when I post this message to the queue, it appears as Base64. However, in the logs of my middleware (SAP CPI), it is shown as a regular message.

When I post it to an online webhook, it also arrives normally as JSON.

Only in Adapter(AMQP)RabbitMQ does it arrive in Base64. The version is 4.0, and AMQP 1.0 is being used.

 

Message encode64 post in rabbit

eyJwYXR0ZXJuIjoidGVzdC5ldnQiLCJkYXRhIjp7IklEIjoiNjYzIiwiS2V5U0FQIjoiMDAwMSIsIlN0YXR1cyI6IlMiLCJNZW5zYWdlU0FQIjoiQ2xpZW50ZSAwMDAxIGNyZWF0ZWQgd2l0aCBzdWNjZXNzLiJ9fQ== 

Coding Groovy:

 

 

 

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message

Message processData(Message message) { 
def fixedBody = '{"pattern":"test.evt","data":{"ID":"663","KeySAP":"0001","Status":"S","MensageSAP":"Cliente 0001 created with success."}}'

message.setBody(fixedBody)


message.setHeader("Content-Type", "text/plain")
message.setHeader("CamelHttpCharacterEncoding", "UTF-8")

return message 
}

entry.title: Re: S4H to CPI. Need help
entry.content: This is crazy. Copy/paste worked. Thank you very much. Would you be able to tell me why the search drop down is not showing all options? Is this a config change somehwere?

entry.title: I am unable to retrieve sent offer letters in the new hire's profile
entry.content: I tried finding it via Job Requisitions as well as the new hire's profile. Any idea how to do this now?

entry.title: Re: S4H to CPI. Need help
entry.content: @Pravin28it looks like the search help is defaulted to display ports with type = '1' (tRFC), so I'm assuming you did the same as I, and setup a port with type = '7' (XML HTTP).  Note however, that you can adjust which search help is used by clicking the filter option.

entry.title: Province Field Blank in Canadian Compliance Forms
entry.content:
Compliance forms have been configured for the Onboarding process. 

The overrideFieldsMeta has been configured with the GLOBAL_FILTER_CONFIG for the Country and WorkState - Province in our case. 

EC Mini Master is being used. The Location object has been configured with every location being associated to a Province. 

The TD1 form triggers and the Province field is blank. Without this, the new hire is unable to submit the form. Also, the provincial form is not triggering.

Has anyone encountered this in their configuration? 

Any leads on what may be causing this? 

Your help and expertise is appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements CDS App Create button not visible in BAS & Fiori Luachpad
entry.content: Hi @MadhuS, Please share if service is V2 or V4 and Draft is enable if its V4 service...

entry.title: Re: Retrieving Sorted Data from CHAR Field with Numeric Value (SAP Basis 7.50+, S/4)
entry.content:
Thanks for the tip.

Generally speaking, it works like that in "all" programming languages. It happens for any comparison like in SORT and IF, e.g. the text '2' is greater than '10' because it compares one character at a time ('2' is greater than '1' and the comparison stops). If numeric types are used for the comparisons, the number 2 is lower than 10 as expected.

Concerning the database table columns containing numbers, it would be better to define columns of type numeric instead of character, of course. In your case, VTTK is very old design (custom fields were provided by SAP to contain anything). Hopefully, it's been a while that custom fields are to be appended to the tables when needed, any type can be chosen.

Note that CAST from CHAR to NUMC is not sufficient alone (you need a second CAST to a numeric type e.g. INT8 as you proposed), because the characters are copied without any transformation, the spaces and other non-numeric characters are kept as-is, etc.: "There is no special handling for the special target type for numeric text, NUMC, and for the date/time types DATS and TIMS. It is advisable to only convert valid values" (ABAP doc > CAST > Source Types CHAR, SSTRING > Character-like target type (e.g. NUMC)).

As you say, the construct "CAST( CAST( char AS NUMC( 40 ) ) AS numerictype )" is magic, also because NUMC is known to support only the digits 0 to 9 but CAST keeps the negative sign and the decimal point! "The validity of the content of the source field [of type NUMC] is not checked, which means that there can be decimal places." (ABAP doc > CAST > Source Type NUMC > Numeric target type).

Limitation: INT8 supports up to 19 digits (values from -9,223,372,036,854,775,808 to +9,223,372,036,854,775,807).

FLTP can be used instead of INT8 but the CAST keeps only 16 representative digits, so the comparison may be inexact if the number has 17 or more digits (e.g. '123456789012345670' and '123456789012345671' are both rounded to the same number 1.2345678901234566E+17).

Cast from NUMC to DECFLOAT34 is available since 7.54. It's the only solution to compare exactly numbers up to 34 digits.

NB: for NUMC, CAST of CDS Views has exactly the same behavior as ABAP SQL: ABAP Keyword Documentation > CAST > Character-Like Source Type.

entry.title: Re: Enable/Disable custom action button in SAP Fiori List...
entry.content:
Hi @tejaswikosanam 

You probabily need Feature control (Instant Feature), please have a look to below blog post contains what you needed...

action (feature : instance) <your action name> result [1] $self;

Also Implement the Get_instance_feature method to set button enable or disabled.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/how-to-add-feature-control-in-abap-restful-application-programming-model/ba-p/13546757 

Hope this helps...

 

Thanks-

entry.title: How to find the root cause of a high CPU utilization in SAP Focused RUN
entry.content:
Hi,

As part of monitoring, we could see serious CPU utilization spikes for our Live Production System.

Is there any possibility to find the details/cause for this spike at Focused Run Application?
Like who is the user or program/backend job which caused this high CPU spike.

How do we find true cause for this CPU spike in Focused Run?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to find the root cause of a high CPU utilization...
entry.content:
Hello Community,

To gather more data about these high usages, there are two applications in SAP Focused Run that can assist you:

  • System Analysis/Root Cause Analysis
    • This tool allows you to enable additional data collections for ABAP and HANA Systems (per system).
    • With this information is possible to analyze it further checking details of resource consumption during a high utilization time.
  • Real User Monitoring
    • This tool helps you identify end-user calls and communication flows.

For a better understanding of how to utilize these tools, please refer to the documentation above.

Thanks and best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Your SAP Oil, Gas, and Energy Newsletter Collection
entry.content:
Dear SAP Oil, Gas, and Energy Community,

We are thrilled to announce that all our newsletter issues for 2024 and the upcoming 2025 will be conveniently available in one location. Whether you want to revisit a favorite issue or discover something new, these resources are easily accessible.

Your thoughts and feedback are incredibly valuable to us, and we would love to hear your opinion on the topics that you find interesting or helpful. 

Here’s how you can subscribe to the upcoming newsletter editions.

Thank you for being a part of our community. Happy reading!

Your SAP Energy and Utilities Team

2024

  • December
  • September
  • June
  • February

entry.title: "Number Range Status" in T code: SNUM
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,

Need your inputs for question on "Number Range Status" in T code: SNUM

(1) What is the use of Number Range status. I was thinking that is the last used number by system from the range, but when I check the number displayed in Number Range status, it does not show any results

(2) Can we say that based on Number range status, we can estimate how much series of numbers available for that number range? Example: 999 Numbers available (19999 - 19000)

Number RangeFrom NumberTo NumberNumber Range StatusAvailable Numbers
XX100001999919000999

(3) We have a situation where "Number Range Status" and "To Number", the difference is reducing each day, does it mean documents will not be posted, if the difference will be ZERO? 

(4) What can the actions be taken based on scenario mentioned in (3)? 

Thank you in advance for your response

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: How to use the OData Client Proxy in SAP S/4 HANA or How to use the OData Service Consumption Mo
entry.content:
Hi @Andre_Fischer,

I noticed that not all oData v2 services are supported when creating the service consumption model. I tried creating it in BTP ABAP trial for Sales order and it gave me this error.

I am using the EDMX file from this link: https://api.sap.com/api/OP_API_SALES_ORDER_SRV_0001/overview

However, when I tried to create the model for Business Partner and Pricing Condition records, I didn't encounter this issue.

link for business partner: https://api.sap.com/api/OP_API_BUSINESS_PARTNER_SRV/overview

link for pricing condition: https://api.sap.com/api/OP_API_SLSPRCGCONDITIONRECORD_SRV_0001/overview

Could you have a look and it from your end? Thanks!

entry.title: "Revolutionizing SAP Recruitment with HireRig.AI"
entry.content:
The new white paper on HireRig.AI presents an innovative approach to SAP recruitment, addressing key challenges faced by businesses in adapting to rapid technological changes. By leveraging AI-driven, project-based hiring, HireRig.AI is set to transform traditional recruitment methods, eliminating biases, accelerating the hiring process, and ensuring a more accurate match between candidates’ skills and SAP project requirements.

Key insights from the white paper include:

  • How project-based hiring through HireRig.AI enhances recruitment efficiency and effectiveness.
  • Real-world case studies demonstrating the platform’s impact on reducing time-to-hire and mitigating project delays.
  • The cost-saving potential of flexible, scalable hiring models for SAP businesses. 

Link - https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7272695170360328192?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop

For an in-depth exploration of how HireRig.AI can revolutionize your SAP talent acquisition strategy, I invite you to read the full white paper. Let’s collaborate to shape the future of SAP recruitment and drive innovation in the technical hiring ecosystem. Transform the Future of SAP Recruitment with HireRig.AI

entry.title: Re: Error during GRN posting
entry.content: combination assignment of material group and GL account is not possible

entry.title: Hi , SAP SD Rev.Rec (VF44) for Brazil
entry.content:
Hi ,

We run SAP SD revenue recognition VF44 . For Brazil VF44 is considering TAX like posting in account like :

'320002 '/ Brazil - Cofins Tax Offset

'320003' / Brazil - PIS Tax Offset

'320004' / Brazil - ISS Tax Offset

Any documentation or setup we have to do for Brazil ? Any help / feedback if welcome .

Thank you

entry.title: Financial Master Data for SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Until the 2302 version of S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, we had the scope item 4AJ available called "Financial Master Data for SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central". However, this has been deprecated with the release 2308 without a successor scope item. Can someone please explain how to proceed for the integration of financial master data for implementations of newer releases?

Best regards,
Kaiwen

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP - Managed scenario - Create Supplier invoice by Action using EML and I_SUPPLIERINVOICET
entry.content: Hi Jindrich, did you solve your issue?

entry.title: Re: AGGREGATION ON CDS VIEW and Filtering data with where clause issue
entry.content:
It is ABAP 7.50, not 7.5, and it's the same "bug" in ABAP 7.58. I guess it's worth creating a blog post to attract CDS/Open SQL experts and get their opinion.

If there's a bug even without FOR ALL ENTRIES, then maybe the cause is the join between two CDS views 1 and 2, where the CDS view 2 is based on the CDS view 1. What happens if you make the CDS view 2 select directly from NSDM_N_MARD instead of ZCDS1?

entry.title: How to update the status of manually imported TRs in Cloud ALM's Features?
entry.content:
Hello team,

We have an issue with the status of the OTs (transport requests) in the Features app of SAP Cloud ALM.

Due to an unexpected upgrade to the system, we had to manually import the OTs (transports requests) to QAS but when checking CALM, the status of the OTs is still "Released".

Is there a way to update CALM to show the real status of the OT?

Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to update the status of manually imported TRs in...
entry.content: Please follow the resolution steps provided in ##0003551369 - How to update transport request status in Cloud ALM > Feature for TRs manually imported into managed system?

entry.title: Re: Streams in RAP : Uploading PDF , Excel and Other Files in RAP Application
entry.content: @amo_ry I have same issue. I have only attachment icon. Can not upload any file. Did you find any solution?

entry.title: Re: FSCM - Credit Limit Requests Approval using Manage Credit Management Rules
entry.content:
@darrelzaulda 

I was able to configure and set up complete CLR workflow and it works as expected, 

but when i go to Manage Credit Account app and go to segment level to calculated Credit Limit, it calculates the CL, but after that it should create CLR automatically and route it for approval, shouldn't it? this is not happening, instead we are having to create CLR manually from Credit Limit Request app, which is very counterintuitive from SAP (if that is the way to do it). We want to keep the CL calculation Log as is and have system create CLR automatically, can it be done?

I would really appreciate your insight on this.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Clean Core on-prem, pratical meaning
entry.content:
Hi Patrick,

I just want to share my thoughts with you on this topic. The enhancement what you have mentioned is just only a branch of bigger spectrum of clean core. In your case as it is brown field implementation the migration to clean core can happen only gradually . As per me ,this would be a good approach. The biggest challenge is the non availability of SAP released objects for all scenario's whether it is enhancements or api. My recommending are given below

1. Gradually migrate users to stand fiori apps instead of gui transactions

2. For all new enhancements choose cloud first approach 

3.Follow 3-Tier approach proposed by sap for enhancement.

What about all the other objects? 
- DDIC domains, data elements tables—> Depends on case to case on how to migrate to clean core. But these objects custom object are allowed in clean core.  

- BTE events—> not supported in clean core. 
- function modules (several hundret)—> One option is to look for standard class methods. For instance's ,cloud class method is available to replace FM 

MD_CONVERT_MATERIAL_UNIT


- Z-report and includes (~2000)—> Not supported in clean core. Evaluate each program on how to migrate to clean core.
- SQ01/SQ02–> Use fiori app view browser

for the below two enhancements look for released BADI’s . If there is not standard release BADI’s stay in tier3. 
- copy rules (SD), which are some kind of modification
- alreads implemented BAdI

The above mentioned points are based on my self learning on clean core. If you disagree or has different view points on my suggestions the please post here.

Thanks,

Sujith

entry.title: Re: Proration based upon leaves type in variable pay temp...
entry.content:
Hi @Ritanshi 

No you can only integrate it if there is a field in Job Info.

For example if you have Time Off implemented add a field below to track it as per my explanation in this blog:

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/time-off-integration-in-compensation-eligibility-rules/ba-p/13579851

 

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Production loss analysis process
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I am currently designing a custom process to enable a process to register production loss events in some production machine due to some failure, which can be entered manually for a date (e.g., suppose we have for the period of 12/01/2024 until 12/31/2024, the equipment produced X less than it should, and every occurrence of the event that led to the production loss x_i is recorded according to the date it occurred, how many it was lost, etc. All of this information would be manually entered by the operator

in other words, it's a manual process where the loss is reported manually. the sum of every x_i of every event totals X, and each event has a detailing of what happened (i.e., what led to the production loss) in terms of a loss tree (like a catalog profile).

Is there anything close to this in the standard version of S/4 HANA 2023, SP2? I have never seen this in SAP and I am inclined to go with a custom development to address all requirements associated. I saw some other questions in SCN regarding this subject but found no standard solutions

Thank you,

Erick Grilo.

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
HI,

I'm Moamen Hassan I am so excited with this journey that will enable me to be certified,

I consider myself from people who lack the financial means to afford a certification attempt for themselves.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Payment run; clearing journal entry
entry.content:
Hi Ivangomez

There are some apps available to reverse payments.

  • For a single payment: 

Reset cleared items FBRA app. In this app you add the document payment, and select the option "Reset and Reverse". Then you need to add the details of the reverse reason and date, as a best practice us the same payment date.

As a result, your payment will be cleared by the reversal document and the supplier invoice will be an open item again.

  • For massive document payment reversal:

If you don't have activated BCM (Bank Communication Mgmt) for payment approval, you can use the Schedule Accounts Payable Jobs app > Reverse Payment Run template

Link https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/031c345485b84c8c94265be9ef61d3a8/8495b14aa22f4626bd879f90a9ccc749.html 

3285159 - Error 'Payments from payment run XX XX are already awaiting approval (SAP BCM)' in Job Template Reverse Payment Run 

 

Best regards

Edna

entry.title: Re: what is Fieldglass Tenant Truststore?
entry.content:
Hi @Selvaganesan , 

Thank you for reaching out. The Fieldglass Tenant Truststore corresponds to the Create Crypto Asset in Config Manager. You can locate this feature under the Encryption Keys and Certificates tile by clicking on 'New'. For additional guidance, you can access the link provided here: [https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_Fieldglass/b363c9b90a9d4d34bc8ced1065edb922/ece6eb9ca1d34fb8a5eef70fc444349c.html].

 

Should you require further assistance, kindly submit a case to our App Support team via the SAP Help Center.

entry.title: Re: It has never been easier to print from SAP with Microsoft Universal Print
entry.content:
G'day @Martin-Pankraz,

thanks for sharing these insights. Can you please share your thoughts on Frontend Printing using Universal Printing given the following SAP Notes (3238319 and 3456307) providing information on the limited availability of browser-based Frontend Printing when using e.g. SAP Fiori Apps. From my understanding, Frontend Printing is not working reliably anymore using Access Mode G in combination with Fiori apps. 

Feel free to reach out individually! 
Martin

entry.title: Re: General ledger distribution and assessment
entry.content:
Hi Dalao,

You can use the Manage Allocations (F3338) app. 

The scope items related to this process are:

1.- 2US - Create Universal Allocation Master Data

2.- J54 - Overhead Cost Accounting 

Best regards

Edna

entry.title: Re: ABAP Platform On Cloud
entry.content: Thanks !! Yes, I was referring to a setup where SAP S/4HANA on-premise systems are deployed in a 3-system landscape, and this landscape is connected to a 3-system landscape of SAP BTP ABAP Environment systems. It can be done with SAP’s Embedded Environment for the ABAP Programming Model.

entry.title: Re: Search string in EBS, part 3 - bank charges
entry.content:
As a beginner in SAP, I'd have liked to know more about the algorithm used and why, in this scenario as well. All the small details.

Otherwise, it's a very good blog.

entry.title: Re: "Number Range Status" in T code: SNUM
entry.content:
Hello,

 

1) What is the use of Number Range status - It explains that number document has created for specific area where number range assigned.  In you example document number until 19000 has created.

2) Yes, based on this number you can consider how much is left number range. It's better to have alert set up to ensure how much number left by scheduling the job with the program. Example if 10% left number left, this job will send notification email.

3)To Number - Represent that's the highest number it can go after that system will not allow to create document for that defined number range. It's always better to update when we get closer to number.

This creates serious issue in system and document creation will fails.

4) If available is reached, you need to set up new range in SNRO, example 

Existing range 

1000019999

New range

2000029999

There plenty number of blogs/SAP help document how to set up new range. 

Thanks,

Pramod

entry.title: Re: Steps to Activate Electronic Bank Reconciliation Statement - MT940 Format - Part I
entry.content:
Great blog. 

Explained in detail. Thanks alot!

entry.title: Re: Can you please post the step by step implementation p...
entry.content: @Krishna65, if you're an SAP Partner, it's recommended to access this SAP Partner Portal page. Otherwise, these SAP Help Portal pages could be a start (link1, link2).

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite: Transporting Script Collection
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

     I have a question regarding usage of Script Collections in SAP Integration Suite.

Context: In my case, script collection contains the common scripts being utilized by multiple iFlows. 

Issue: There are few Groovy scripts in the script collection which are complete and tested. However, there are few scripts which are currently being worked upon or not yet fully tested. Now I want to transport the scripts to QA/Prod systems which are complete. However, the transport option is only available at the Script Collection Object Level but not at individual script level which means transporting the whole script collection will transport the incomplete/untested scripts as well. How can this be avoided?

#SAPIntegrationSuite, #SAPiFlow #SAPCPI

Thanks and Regards,

    Abhijeet

entry.title: Re: Invalid Schema Name TestCompany
entry.content:
Hi @ramco1917 ,

I have tried the below connection string to connect to SBO_DEMOUS company and it works well.
Its almost same as yours. Can you try like this one?

 try
            {
                string _StrSQL = "SELECT T1.\"ItemCode\", T1.\"Date\", T1.\"Quantity\"  FROM \"SBO_DEMOUS\".OFCT T0 INNER JOIN \"SBO_DEMOUS\".FCT1 T1 ON T0.\"AbsID\" = T1.\"AbsID\" WHERE T0.\"Code\"= '001' ORDER BY T1.\"ItemCode\", T1.\"Date\" ";
                HanaConnection conn = new HanaConnection("Server=<ServerAddress>:30015;UserID=SYSTEM;Password=<password>;");
                conn.Open();
                HanaDataAdapter da = new HanaDataAdapter(_StrSQL, conn);

                da.Fill(_DT);
                conn.Close();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
            }

 Thanks.
Manish

entry.title: Re: CAP using subqueries for case separation
entry.content:
Hi @a_oezsoy ,

How about defining a new entity with the as select from variant as described in the documentation?

The syntax is slightly different, but the query in your example could be translated into such select I believe.

Best,
Peter

entry.title: Re: Regex help
entry.content: Wonderful, I'm glad it worked.

entry.title: Re: Cannot add row without complete selection of batch /...
entry.content:
I have the same error tring to remove batch and serial numbers in the Inventory Postings document and before many tests witch a friend we realized that have a logic between the CountedQuantity field in lines and the Quantity field in the batch or serial sub object.

The logic is, if you want to add a new batch or serial you need to set the field CountedQuantity for exemplo 1 number major than the quantity in stock, and add the batch or serial with te quantity that you added (in case of batch you add the quantity in field quantity, and serial you add the multiple serial numbers corresponding of the quantity).

And if you want to remove batch or serial you need to set CountedQuantity with the reduced quantity and fill the arrays of batch or serial with negative values, thats calls the SAP that you want to remove quantities from stock.

Example in Service Layer:

// removing serial
{
    "CountDate": "2024-12-11T00:00:00Z",
    "BranchID": 1,
    "U_P1_OWNER": 15,
    "InventoryPostingLines": [
        {
            "LineNumber": 1,
            "Remarks": "REF100037; R002; R003; R004",
            "ItemCode": "IT101",
            "WarehouseCode": "01",
            "Price": 1,
            "CountedQuantity": 3,
            "InventoryPostingSerialNumbers": [
                {
                    "InternalSerialNumber": "R007",
                    "Quantity": -1
                }
            ]
        }
    ]
}

// adding serial
{
    "CountDate": "2024-12-11T00:00:00Z",
    "BranchID": 1,
    "U_P1_OWNER": 15,
    "InventoryPostingLines": [
        {
            "LineNumber": 1,
            "Remarks": "REF100037; R002; R003; R004",
            "ItemCode": "IT101",
            "WarehouseCode": "01",
            "Price": 1,
            "CountedQuantity": 3,
            "InventoryPostingSerialNumbers": [
                {
                    "InternalSerialNumber": "R007",
                    "Quantity": 1
                }
            ]
        }
    ]
}

Example in DI API:

SAPbobsCOM.CompanyService oCS = (SAPbobsCOM.CompanyService)oCompany.GetCompanyService();
SAPbobsCOM.InventoryPostingsService oInventoryPostingsService = (InventoryPostingsService)oCS.GetBusinessService(SAPbobsCOM.ServiceTypes.InventoryPostingsService);
SAPbobsCOM.InventoryPosting oInventoryPosting = (InventoryPosting)oInventoryPostingsService.GetDataInterface(SAPbobsCOM.InventoryPostingsServiceDataInterfaces.ipsInventoryPosting);

oInventoryPosting.CountDate = "YOUR DATE";
oInventoryPosting.BranchID = "YOUR BRANCH";
SAPbobsCOM.InventoryPostingLines oInventoryPostingLines = oInventoryPosting.InventoryPostingLines;

SAPbobsCOM.InventoryPostingLine oInventoryPostingLine = oInventoryPostingLines.Add();
oInventoryPostingLine.ItemCode = "YOUR ITEM CODE";
oInventoryPostingLine.WarehouseCode = "YOUR WAREHOUSE";
oInventoryPostingLine.Price = 1; //exemple price
oInventoryPostingLine.CountedQuantity = 3; //exemple count

// removing serial
SAPbobsCOM.InventoryPostingSerialNumber serialNumber = oInventoryPostingLine.InventoryPostingSerialNumbers.Add();
serialNumber.InternalSerialNumber = item.Lote;
serialNumber.Quantity = -1;

// adding serial
SAPbobsCOM.InventoryPostingSerialNumber serialNumber = oInventoryPostingLine.InventoryPostingSerialNumbers.Add();
serialNumber.InternalSerialNumber = item.Lote;
serialNumber.Quantity = 1;

entry.title: Is it possible to have a monthly timesheet that is not calendar month?
entry.content: My customer has employees whose pay period is the 16th to the 15th of the following month. I believe that the monthly timesheet is currently limited to calendar-month only (i.e., 1st through 30th.) Is this correct?

entry.title: 回复： Is is possible to assign different factory calendar f...
entry.content: Yes, the factory calendar is on plant level.

entry.title: Re: Enable automatic user deactivation - action
entry.content: I did this not being aware that it would instantly deactivate the people. But then took comfort in this video: https://dam.sap.com/mac/app/e/video/embed/AKqBNEB?ltr=a&rc=10 which indicated they'd be reactivated just as easily. However this has not turned out to be the case. Instead they get a message "your account was locked" and even when I manually make them active they get another error. Manual reactivation AND the user clearing their google browsing data resolves the issue but this isn't very practical - any guidance would be appreciated!

entry.title: Re: 如何控制物料无价格不允许生产订单的收货
entry.content:
描述检查物料凭证中的项目数据
标识 BADI_MMIM_CHECK_MATDOC_ITEM ，后续找到这个BAPI可控制物料生产入库时没有标准成不准入库，请参考

*价格类型
SELECT single inventoryvaluationprocedure
FROM i_productvaluationbasic
WHERE product = @item_matdoc-material
AND valuationarea = @item_matdoc-plant
INTO @DATA(lv_inventory).
*价格控制
SELECT single pricedeterminationcontrol
FROM i_productvaluationbasic
WHERE product = @item_matdoc-material
AND valuationarea = @item_matdoc-plant
INTO @DATA(lv_pricedeterm1).
*标准价格
SELECT single standardprice
FROM i_productvaluationbasic
WHERE product = @item_matdoc-material
AND valuationarea = @item_matdoc-plant
INTO @DATA(lv_standardprice).
*移动平均价
SELECT single MOVINGAVERAGEPRICE
FROM I_PRODUCTVALUATIONBASIC
WHERE PRODUCT = @item_matdoc-MATERIAL
AND VALUATIONAREA = @item_matdoc-PLANT
INTO @DATA(lv_STANDARDPRICE1).
*采购科目分配类别
SELECT SINGLE ACCOUNTASSIGNMENTCATEGORY
FROM I_PURCHASEORDERITEMAPI01
WHERE PURCHASEORDER = @ITEM_MATDOC-PURCHASEORDER
AND PURCHASEORDERITEM = @ITEM_MATDOC-PURCHASEORDERITEM
INTO @DATA(LV_TYPE).
*物料类型
SELECT SINGLE ProductType
FROM I_PRODUCT
WHERE PRODUCT = @item_matdoc-MATERIAL
INTO @DATA(LV_ProductType).

*判断生产工厂下，S价为0价格的不允许货物移动
IF item_matdoc-plant = '1000' OR item_matdoc-plant = '2000' OR item_matdoc-plant = '3000'.
IF lv_inventory = 'S' AND lv_standardprice = '0' AND ( item_matdoc-goodsmovementtype = '201' OR item_matdoc-goodsmovementtype = '101' ).

IF LV_TYPE = ''.
APPEND VALUE #( messagetype = 'E' messagetext = '当前物料没有标准成本，禁止出入库。' ) TO messages.
ENDIF.
ENDIF.
ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: 如何控制物料无价格不允许生产订单的收货
entry.content: 描述检查物料凭证中的项目数据 标识 BADI_MMIM_CHECK_MATDOC_ITEM ，后续找到这个BAPI可控制物料生产入库时没有标准成不准入库，请参考 *价格类型 SELECT single inventoryvaluationprocedure FROM i_productvaluationbasic WHERE product = @item_matdoc-material AND valuationarea = @item_matdoc-plant INTO @DATA(lv_inventory). *价格控制 SELECT single pricedeterminationcontrol FROM i_productvaluationbasic WHERE product = @item_matdoc-material AND valuationarea = @item_matdoc-plant INTO @DATA(lv_pricedeterm1). *标准价格 SELECT single standardprice FROM i_productvaluationbasic WHERE product = @item_matdoc-material AND valuationarea = @item_matdoc-plant INTO @DATA(lv_standardprice). *移动平均价 SELECT single MOVINGAVERAGEPRICE FROM I_PRODUCTVALUATIONBASIC WHERE PRODUCT = @item_matdoc-MATERIAL AND VALUATIONAREA = @item_matdoc-PLANT INTO @DATA(lv_STANDARDPRICE1). *采购科目分配类别 SELECT SINGLE ACCOUNTASSIGNMENTCATEGORY FROM I_PURCHASEORDERITEMAPI01 WHERE PURCHASEORDER = @ITEM_MATDOC-PURCHASEORDER AND PURCHASEORDERITEM = @ITEM_MATDOC-PURCHASEORDERITEM INTO @DATA(LV_TYPE). *物料类型 SELECT SINGLE ProductType FROM I_PRODUCT WHERE PRODUCT = @item_matdoc-MATERIAL INTO @DATA(LV_ProductType). *判断生产工厂下，S价为0价格的不允许货物移动 IF item_matdoc-plant = '1000' OR item_matdoc-plant = '2000' OR item_matdoc-plant = '3000'. IF lv_inventory = 'S' AND lv_standardprice = '0' AND ( item_matdoc-goodsmovementtype = '201' OR item_matdoc-goodsmovementtype = '101' ). IF LV_TYPE = ''. APPEND VALUE #( messagetype = 'E' messagetext = '当前物料没有标准成本，禁止出入库。' ) TO messages. ENDIF. ENDIF. ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: Blending for SAP BW Live Data Models
entry.content:
Hi, you might find your answer on this page:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/7b9defa34dc34c0881dee863e6b4e5c5.html?locale=en-US&q=blending

If you are trying to create financial statements you likely want to blend data in a table. This is not currently supported in the Optimised Story Experience. This might mean all the other blending limitations are secondary.

From our experience with blending in SAC, it is pretty terrible at best, and I would strongly suggest you perform the required data joins in the data model in BW, and not try to achieve it in SAC. A Composite Provider in BW across your Budget and Actual data would definitely be the preferred approach.

Cheers, Ivan.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere: BW Series – Getting Started (Part 1)
entry.content: I would like to know more about the abap ,for example in bw transformation has routine abap. Now in Datasphere has abap?

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere – Enable SAP HANA Development Infrastructure (HDI)
entry.content: Very Nice.. With HDI it is possible create abap routine?

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content:
@LenaSumrell1 - We did get it to work,  we were always able to see the higher catchup amount after release 137 D7, but the extra Super catchup was given to employees who were not entitled. This problem was ultimately fixed by D9 139 but the amount was always accurate. 

We configured V_T7USBEN03, with the same savings plans configured in V_5UBA_WT.

entry.title: Re: XI Adapter - Error handling in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi,

I was researching exception handling for XI and found this thread. Since we don't have any proposed solutions, I decided to investigate further on by my self.

I know this thread is old and maybe everyone has already found a solution, but for reference, here's what I did.

I don't have much knowledge on Groovy, so there may be improvements that could be made to the code and I would appreciate your feedback.

I get the base of this code from here.
https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/script-example-for-exception-handling-in-http-receiver

 

 

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;
import java.util.HashMap;
def Message processData(Message message) {
    
    // get a map of properties
    def map = message.getProperties();
    
    // get an exception java class instance
    def ex = map.get("CamelExceptionCaught");
    
    if (ex!=null) {
     
        // an XI adapter throws an instance of org.apache.cxf.binding.soap.SoapFault
        if (ex.getClass().getCanonicalName().equals("org.apache.cxf.binding.soap.SoapFault")) {
            
            // get tag "Code" of XML exception
            def code = ex.getDetail().getElementsByTagNameNS("*", "Code").item(0).getTextContent().trim();
            
            // get tag "Stack" of XML exception
            def error = ex.getDetail().getElementsByTagNameNS("*", "Stack").item(0).getTextContent().trim();
            
            // set "Code" and "Stack" values on response body
            message.setBody(code + "\r\n" + error);
            
            // change http code to 500 (Internal Server Error)
            def header = message.getHeaders();
            message.setHeader("CamelHttpResponseCode", "500");
            
        }
        
    }

    return message;

}

 

Option to send full detail of exception to response payload that I hadn't found before.
Based on https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/fetch-soap-fault-error-response-from-receiver-in-sap-cloud-platform/ba-p/13460975  

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;
import java.util.HashMap;
import groovy.xml.*;
def Message processData(Message message) {
    
    // get a map of properties
    def map = message.getProperties();
    
    // get an exception java class instance
    def ex = map.get("CamelExceptionCaught");
    
    if (ex!=null) {
     
        // an XI adapter throws an instance of org.apache.cxf.binding.soap.SoapFault
        if (ex.getClass().getCanonicalName().equals("org.apache.cxf.binding.soap.SoapFault")) {
            
            def xml = XmlUtil.serialize(ex.getDetail());    
            message.setBody(xml);

            // change http code to 500 (Internal Server Error)
            def header = message.getHeaders();
            message.setHeader("CamelHttpResponseCode", "500");
            
        }
        
    }

    return message;

}

Regards,
Miguel Motta

entry.title: Re: Additional SAP Community feeds 📡
entry.content: Thanks for the insights shared, very useful.

entry.title: SAP S4 PUBLIC CLOUD - WHAT IS IT ABOUT
entry.content:
SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Explained in Detail

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud is a robust, cloud-based enterprise resource planning (ERP) solution designed to enhance and streamline business processes across various industries. Here is an in-depth explanation:

Core Features:

  1. Pre-Configured System: This ERP solution comes pre-configured with essential business processes for different functions, such as finance, supply chain, and manufacturing, making it ready to use right out of the box. This minimizes the need for extensive customizations and accelerates the implementation process.

  2. Scalability and Flexibility: One of the key advantages of SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud is its scalability. Organizations can easily scale their operations by adding new users, expanding to new markets, or incorporating additional products without adding complexity to the system.

  3. Continuous Innovation: The platform is continually updated with the latest advancements and industry best practices. It incorporates cutting-edge technologies like artificial intelligence (AI), machine learning (ML), robotic process automation (RPA), and advanced analytics to help businesses stay competitive and innovative.

  4. Cloud Management: All technical operations, including system maintenance, backups, disaster recovery, and data protection, are managed by the cloud service provider. This ensures high availability and reduces the burden on the organization’s IT department.

  5. Seamless Integration: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud offers robust integration capabilities. It can easily connect with other systems and applications via ready-to-go APIs, facilitating smooth data exchange and interoperability.

  6. User-Friendly Interface: The solution provides a modern, intuitive user interface that enhances user experience. It features role-based access, ensuring that users have the tools and information they need to perform their tasks effectively.

  7. Sustainability and AI: The platform is designed with sustainability in mind, providing tools to monitor and reduce the environmental impact of business operations. Built-in AI capabilities also allow for deep analysis of business data to support decision-making.

Benefits:

  • Operational Efficiency: By streamlining business processes, the platform significantly enhances operational efficiency, reducing manual work and the likelihood of errors.

  • Agility: The flexibility of the cloud allows organizations to quickly adapt to changing business needs, market conditions, and technological advancements.

  • Cost Savings: With no need for extensive IT infrastructure or on-premise hardware, organizations can save on upfront costs and reduce overall IT expenditure.

  • Continuous Improvement: Regular updates ensure that the system is always equipped with the latest features and best practices, allowing organizations to continuously improve their operations.

Ideal Use Cases:

  • Small to Mid-Size Enterprises: This solution is particularly beneficial for small to mid-size enterprises that want to adopt industry best practices without the need for extensive customization.

  • Large Enterprises: Larger organizations can use SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud in combination with other SAP solutions in a two-tier ERP structure, allowing them to manage different subsidiaries or business units efficiently.

Implementation Process:

  • Guided Implementation: The platform offers a guided implementation process that includes a fast technical setup and role-based, intuitive interfaces. This simplifies the transition and helps organizations go live quickly.

  • Regular Updates: Enhancements and upgrades are automatically applied on a regular schedule, ensuring that the system remains up-to-date without disrupting business operations.

Continuous Support:

  • Managed Services: SAP manages all aspects of the system’s technical operations, including maintenance, security, and compliance, ensuring that the organization can focus on its core business activities.

Innovation and Competitiveness:

  • Technological Advancements: By leveraging advanced technologies such as AI, ML, and RPA, organizations can automate routine tasks, gain deeper insights into their operations, and make data-driven decisions.

  • Market Responsiveness: The system's flexibility and scalability enable organizations to respond quickly to market changes, customer demands, and emerging trends, maintaining a competitive edge.

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud provides a comprehensive, cloud-based ERP solution that helps organizations streamline their processes, reduce costs, and stay agile and competitive in the ever-evolving business landscape. It’s designed to support digital transformation initiatives, offering the tools and capabilities needed to drive innovation and achieve business goals.

entry.title: Re: CTMを使用したCloud Integrationの移送設定手順(How to Transport Cloud Integration with TMS in Japanese)
entry.content:
「SAP BTPアカウントを複数持っていること

　　　片方がトライアルアカウントでも可能です」

とありますが、両方がトライアルだとできないでしょうか。

entry.title: Confirm the prerequisites of setup EM in HA scenario
entry.content:
We are referring below link for High Availability Setup for Introscope Enterprise Manager:

For the Prerequisites point 4, it mentions The agents on-the-fly feature is enabled, I don't undestand why this is prerequisites to setup EM HA, it is only one configuration in solman managed system configuration as per my understanding. Would you please clarify on this?
Also for the agents on-the-fly feature, I think it should be enabled for for the HA cluster environment, including solman and managed systems, would you please confirm on this?

Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Confirm the prerequisites of setup EM in HA scenario
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

For the Introscope EM in HA scenario, Agent on-the-fly is required. After you enabled the Agent on-the-fly, agent node will be generated for logical hostname should be generated, and it should be used for discovering Introscope EM in step Define CA Introscope. When the Introscope EM is switched from host A to host B, the agent failover will be done with it.

For the Agent on-the-fly, it should be done for the Introscope hosts(where the Introscope EM is installed). If the Solution Manager system is in the same hosts/HA scenario with Introscope EM, then the Agent on-the-fly should be enabled for each hosts.
For more details about Agent on-the-fly, please refer to the documentation below:
https://wiki.scn.sap.com/wiki/display/SMSETUP/Diagnostics+Agent+and+HA+Support

 
And about the managed systems(like ECC or S4) which are in HA scenario, it is highly recommended to activate Agent on-the-fly. Because when you perform a failover in HA scenario, the system will be switched with logical hostname from one physical/virtual host to another host. After you enabled the Agent on-the-fly, the agent node of the logical hostname will be switched easily. If Agent on-the-fly is not used, the data collection will be interrupted after failover. And after you switched the logical host from one physical/virtual host to another one, you need to execute all configurations on the second host from the beginning.

Best regards,
Haterm

entry.title: Custom CDS view developed in ADT:Status not released when transported to S4/HANA public cloud tenant
entry.content:
Hello, 

New on developing custom CDS data definitions in ADT. 

I managed to create a data definition and transport. I released to S4/HANA Public Cloud tenant. 

The CDS view in S4/HANA is not released. I have tried various annotations to see if that would work to hange the status to released. 

Both the source views used in my custom definition are released. I just cannot get my custom view to go to released. 

Is this a public cloud limitation where custom views developed in ADT cannot be used ?

entry.title: Re: Custom CDS view developed in ADT:Status not released...
entry.content:
Hi, 

I find the below link very helpful. 

Create CDS views in SAP S/4HANA Cloud and consume ... - SAP Community

https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=4DD4E3F7E34E1EEE90E764D92BB906EF&range=CURRENT-LAST#Q4%202024

entry.title: Is it possible to delete css properties by accessing html or dom class selector in javascript?
entry.content:
The first goal we want to achieve is for the calendar to not be obscured by other components.The calendar is obscured by the row component created behind it.

1. problem

 2. attempt to solve

This removes the z-index from classes that apply to the entire component.

This has successfully confirmed that the calendar is not obscured by other components.

Presumably, this problem is an HTML z-index problem. Even if the parent component has a z-index of 1 and the child components have a number greater than 1, it is a problem limited by the parent component, and all components have a z-index property. As it is applied, it restricts dateField, a child component, from moving up to the top.

 

 

 

3. trial

So, I deleted the property on the class using JavaScript when the page was mounted. But it didn't apply. Is it possible to delete the css property of a class like this through JavaScript in buildapp? Or is there a problem with my JavaScript code? If you have any other solutions or comments, please let me know.

entry.title: Re: 公司间销售业务的按单生产业务
entry.content: 经测试BDN然后转5HP的PO时候报错，所以走不通。可能等到2502升级后再测试5D2+MTO是不是就可以了。

entry.title: Re: Few currency codes unavailable
entry.content:
Hi,

As per the following Help Portal Documentation,

Currencies | SAP Help Portal

Please note that the SAP delivery contains all currencies, for example, EUR and USD. The currencies are set up according to the ISO standards and you cannot change them. You cannot create own currencies.

And according to following FAQ note 3492731, 

Configuration of currency codes

Currency codes e.g. EUR, USD are provided as SAP-delivered content. There is no SSCUI available for the maintenance of currency codes.

If the currency codes pre-delivered by SAP are not as your expectation, please raise an incident to the product support team to check the issue further.

Kind Regards.

entry.title: SAP Forms Service by AdobeとS/4HANAの設定について
entry.content:
掲題の件でナレッジをお持ちの方がいらしたらコメントいただければと思います。

弊社のTDD環境で掲題の機能の検証を行おうとしたのですが、
Helpを確認しても構築方法が分からず頓挫しているという状況です。

具体的には以下Helpの手順が不明です。

Help：https://help.sap.com/docs/forms-service-by-adobe/sap-forms-service-cf/getting-started?locale=en-US

手順：4. Create a Forms Service Instance for ABAP Connections

まずHelp画面のようなポップアップが出ません。
またJSONでのアップロードを使用にも設定値に関する情報がHelpに記載がない認識です。

あらためて何かご存じの方がいたら、コメントいただけると幸いです。

entry.title: Deactivate PO release by CL20N/CL24N but not Customizing
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

We need to deactivate the PO release strategies for a large scale of companies.

For the solutions, I'm thinking if we can just set the status of the release strategy Classification status from 1 Released to 2 Locked, instead of deleting all the customizing following the guide in the note 365604 - FAQ: Release strategies in purchasing.

My question is: for these 2 solutions:

1.  set the status of the release strategy Classification status from 1 Released to 2 Locked

2. delete all the release procedure customizing on the sequence of (1) release strategy (2) release indicator (3) release codes (4) release group (5) corresponding class 

Do they have any different impact for the result of deactivating PO release and why?

BTW: Due to my test result, the 1 solution could already achieve the goal - the PO approval steps are gone.

So, I'm thinking this SOFT deactivation works fine, why need to delete the customizing.

Thanks in advance,

 Alex

entry.content: Hi Andrej,

Note : Consignment is activated in this retail system .

After calling stock determination, a quantity of 5.000 EA remains open POS consignment: Problem in stock determination ( )

Thanks and Regards

entry.title: Re: Which Purchase Order App/Report Suggested to be Used...
entry.content: I found there is no such restriction type for purchase orders, only for production orders etc. You can either do the following: Long term: Request function via Customer influence Portal Short term: leverage embedded SAC in Cloud ERP to create a report with necessary fields for QC inspector to check.

entry.title: Re: Content Transport Using SAP Cloud Platform Transport Management Service in SAP CPI CF Environme
entry.content:
Hi @santosh43 ,

You need to create destination name with this  ContentAssemblyService . I can see this not matching what you have created due to which you are getting this error. 

Regards,

Nikhil

entry.title: Session disconnect time for apps on SAP public cloud apps
entry.content:
Dear experts,

We would like to know about the session time for apps.

For example, when we try to fill invoices and leave it unsaved for a while, it often happens that the session ends automatically and the information we were filling is no longer maintained. 

Is there a parameter that is related to this session?

Thank you in advance.

Fujita

entry.title: Re: SAP Forms Service by AdobeとS/4HANAの設定について
entry.content:
Step 4 は Key を指定するところですね。
Configure the SAP BTP Cloud Foundry Environment Subaccount with SAP Forms Service by Adobe and Test with Postman
を参照してみてください。

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/configure-the-sap-btp-cloud-foundry-environment-subaccount-with-sap-forms/ba-p/13536407

entry.title: Re: Which Purchase Order App/Report Suggested to be Used...
entry.content: I found there is no such restriction type for purchase orders, only for production orders etc. You can either do the following: Long term: Request function via Customer influence Portal Short term: leverage embedded SAC in Cloud ERP to generate a report with needed field for QC inspector to use.

entry.title: Error auto cert refresh failed with response code 503 when creating connection by cloud connector

This error is totally new for me. After search on the net or ask for chat GPT. I can't fiind good answer. I hope somebody giving me the adice.

Thanks.

T.N

entry.title: Re: Which Purchase Order App/Report Suggested to be Used...
entry.content: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/1167 you can create request via this link. State you need similar functions in production order/Process order

entry.title: Re: Which Purchase Order App/Report Suggested to be Used...
entry.content: Restriction type ID: PP_PI_PRICE_INFO Hide price information in production/process orders

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Cockpit free trail account - error "Service"...
entry.content: I have the same problem

entry.title: Search filed on a calculated field
entry.content:
Hi,

I built a FIORI report based on I_Supplier CDS.

I put the field SupplierName as a search field.

I get this short dump:

Database returned the SQL code 7. Error text: feature not supported: CONTAINS predicates on expression RTRIM(SUBSTR(RTRIM(REPLACE(RTRIM(CONCAT(RTRIM(LFA1.NAME1), RTRIM(CONCAT(' &@', RTRIM(LFA1.NAME2))))), '&@', '')), 1, 80))

Is there a way (other then using NAME1 and NAME2  separately) to fix the problem?

@AndreFischer

entry.title: Re: Custom CDS view developed in ADT:Status not released...
entry.content: Thanks for the link. The Custom CDS View app is too limited for what the customer wants. Thats why I had to use ADT

entry.title: Re: Concept of Event/Message flow and configuration details of Queue and Webhook in Event Mesh
entry.content: Good blog, but what's missing is pulling from a queue by AMQP protocol, e.g. from an Iflow with an AMQP sender adapter. This is probably the most efficient way to consume messages from a queue, as it's listener based.

entry.title: Re: SAP instance reached state SHUTDOWN after having state STARTING
entry.content: Please see the uploaded file

entry.title: Create Overhead Allocation Cycles - Cost Centers - Actual
entry.content:
Hello Expert, 

Earlier, when I used to create an actual assessment cycle in the public cloud, I used to get a different screen. Now, when I go to that tile, I get an error.
Tile name - Create Overhead Allocation Cycles - Cost Centers - Actual 

Error -  Actual Assessments is Replaced By Universal Allocation 
I have tried looking for the solution but unable to find one. Kindly suggest related solution and please provide related document and links. 

Kind Regards
Shubham T.
